creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
x11/nvidia-driver-304 can not be built on RELENG_9
pertinent info:
system updated last night:
/usr/src: r279796
/usr/ports: r380829
on RELENG_9/amd64

make install for x11/nvidia-driver-304 finally returns:
...
ormat-extensions  -Wmissing-include-dirs -fdiagnostics-show-option   -c nvidia_s
ysctl.c
nvidia_sysctl.c: In function 'nv_sysctl_init':
nvidia_sysctl.c:610: error: size of array '__assert_19' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:620: error: size of array '__assert_20' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:630: error: size of array '__assert_21' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:640: error: size of array '__assert_22' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:664: error: size of array '__assert_24' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:674: error: size of array '__assert_25' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:684: error: size of array '__assert_26' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:694: error: size of array '__assert_27' is negative
nvidia_sysctl.c:704: error: size of array '__assert_28' is negative
*** [nvidia_sysctl.o] Error code 1
1 error
*** [all] Error code 2
1 error
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-304.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/nvidia-driver-304.

This is for: nvidia-driver-304-304.125

using MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE returns the same error.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
